team_name: Samanvay — A Causal Semantic Interoperability Fabric Between Karnataka's Single Window System and 40+ Department Systems
summary: Design a layer that propagates service requests both ways between Karnataka's Single Window System and legacy department systems using UBID as the common join key.
key_steps: Mapping department systems with UBID Registry
optimization_claims: Causal Interoperability Graph (CIG) for predictive integration
Zero-Trust PII with Partial Homomorphic Encryption
Neuro-Symbolic Conflict Arbitration with Explanations in Kannada
CRDT Consistency Layer and Self-Healing Schema Drift Detection
constraints_addressed: Single-day cutover is not realistic at this scale
Changes are not propagating between SWS and department systems
